mapper.select:
SELECT t.id AS ticketId, o.id AS orderId, o.order_number AS orderNumber, oi.product_name AS productName, o.ordered_at AS orderedAt, oi.unit_price AS unitPrice, CAST(oi.unit_price * (100 - COALESCE(p.commission_rate, 0)) / 100.0 AS INTEGER) AS supplyPrice, t.ticket_number AS couponNumber, TO_CHAR(t.valid_from, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS validFrom, TO_CHAR(t.valid_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS validTo, p.name AS partnerName, o.customer_name AS customerName, o.customer_phone AS customerPhone, o.paid_at AS ticketSentDate, t.ticket_used_date AS ticketUsedDate, o.canceled_at AS canceledAt,
CASE WHEN o.status IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED') THEN '취소' WHEN t.status = 'CANCELLED' THEN '취소' WHEN t.ticket_used = true THEN '사용완료' When t.valid_from Is Not null and t.valid_from > CURRENT_DATE then '사용시작전' WHEN t.valid_to IS NOT NULL AND t.valid_to < CURRENT_DATE THEN '기간 만료' ELSE '사용가능' END AS ticketStatus, CASE WHEN o.status IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED') THEN o.canceled_at WHEN t.status = 'CANCELLED' THEN t.updated_at WHEN t.ticket_used = true THEN t.ticket_used_date ELSE NULL END AS processedAt FROM order_tickets t JOIN order_items oi ON oi.id = t.order_item_id JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products pr ON pr.id = oi.product_id LEFT JOIN partners p ON p.id = pr.partner_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND pr.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND o.status != 'PENDING_PAYMENT'
AND ( Upper(o.order_number) LIKE '%' || Upper(#{srchWord}) || '%' OR Upper(o.customer_name) LIKE '%' || Upper(#{srchWord}) || '%' OR Upper(oi.product_name) LIKE '%' || Upper(#{srchWord}) || '%' OR Upper(t.ticket_number) LIKE '%' || Upper(#{srchWord}) || '%' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM order_item_coupons oic2 WHERE oic2.order_item_id = oi.id AND Upper(oic2.coupon_number) LIKE '%' || Upper(#{srchWord}) || '%' ) )
AND Date(o.ordered_at) >= #{begDate}
AND Date(o.ordered_at) <= #{endDate}
AND t.ticket_used = true and t.status = 'USED' AND o.status NOT IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED')
AND t.ticket_used = false and t.status = 'ISSUED' AND o.status NOT IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED') AND (t.valid_from IS NULL OR t.valid_from <= CURRENT_DATE) and (t.valid_to Is null Or t.valid_to >= CURRENT_DATE)
AND o.status IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED') and t.status = 'CANCELLED'
AND t.ticket_used = false and t.status = 'ISSUED' AND o.status NOT IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED')
AND t.valid_from IS Not NULL and t.valid_from > CURRENT_DATE and t.valid_to Is Not null and t.valid_to < CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY o.ordered_at DESC, t.created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) AS totalOrderCnt, COUNT(t.id) AS totalTicketCnt, COALESCE(SUM(oi.unit_price), 0) AS totalSalesPrice, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(oi.unit_price * (100 - COALESCE(p.commission_rate, 0)) / 100.0 AS INTEGER)), 0) AS totalSupplyPrice FROM order_tickets t JOIN order_items oi ON oi.id = t.order_item_id JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products pr ON pr.id = oi.product_id LEFT JOIN partners p ON p.id = pr.partner_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND pr.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND o.status != 'PENDING_PAYMENT'
AND Date(o.ordered_at) >= #{begDate}
AND Date(o.ordered_at) <= #{endDate}
AND t.ticket_used = true and t.status = 'USED' AND o.status NOT IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED')
AND t.ticket_used = false and t.status = 'ISSUED' AND o.status NOT IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED') AND (t.valid_from IS NULL OR t.valid_from <= CURRENT_DATE) and (t.valid_to Is null Or t.valid_to >= CURRENT_DATE)
AND o.status IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED') and t.status = 'CANCELLED'
AND t.ticket_used = false and t.status = 'ISSUED' AND o.status NOT IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED')
AND t.valid_from IS Not NULL and t.valid_from > CURRENT_DATE and t.valid_to Is Not null and t.valid_to < CURRENT_DATE
